chunks.text: EECS Undergraduate Newsletter | December 6, 2024 - EECS at Berkeley. The newsletter provides updates and information for undergraduate students in the Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences department at UC Berkeley. It includes announcements about events, opportunities, and resources relevant to the academic and professional development of students. This edition covers various topics such as upcoming deadlines, workshops, and faculty news to keep students informed and engaged with the department community.

The newsletter highlights important dates and deadlines for students, including registration periods, scholarship applications, and exam schedules. It also features announcements about student organizations, research opportunities, and internship postings to support career growth. Additionally, it may include tips for academic success, such as study resources and advising sessions, to help students navigate their coursework and plan for future semesters effectively.

This edition of the newsletter discusses faculty-related updates, such as open faculty positions and new hires in the EECS department. It may provide details on how students can interact with faculty, attend office hours, or participate in research projects. The newsletter aims to foster connections between students and professors, encouraging collaboration and mentorship opportunities that enhance the educational experience at Berkeley.
